subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath come with the Truth in His mighty Kingdom and adorned therewith them that dwell in the heavens and on earth, save them who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من اتی بالحق بملکوته العظیم و زین به من فی السموات و الارضین الا من
